phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent audio guides
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde alquilo las audioguías disponibles?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh al-KEE-loh lahs ow-dyoh-GHEE-ahs dee-poh-NEE-bles?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador de recepción, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the counter next to the entrance.

responses.english: At the counter next to the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: En el mostrador de recepción, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the medieval collection is
phrases.text_local: ¿Podría indicarme dónde está la colección medieval?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿Po-DREE-a een-dee-KAR-meh DON-deh es-TAH la ko-lek-SYON meh-dee-EH-val?

likely_response.local: Suba a la primera planta, salas 4 y
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah AH LAH pree-MEH-rah PLAHN-tah SAH-lahs Y
likely_response.translation_en: First floor, rooms four and five.

responses.english: First floor, rooms four and five.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah AH LAH pree-MEH-rah PLAHN-tah SAH-lahs Y
responses.local: Suba a la primera planta, salas 4 y

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are lockers for bags
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay consigna para guardar bolsos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, AH-ee kohn-SEEN-yah PAH-rah GWAR-dahr BOHL-sohs?

likely_response.local: Sí, consigna gratuita en el vestíbulo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ kohn-SEEH-nah grah-too-EE-tah EHN EHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, free lockers in the lobby.

responses.english: Yes, free lockers in the lobby.
responses.phonetic: SÍ kohn-SEEH-nah grah-too-EE-tah EHN EHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh
responses.local: Sí, consigna gratuita en el vestíbulo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla para comprar entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah PAH-rah kohm-PRAHR en-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: En la planta baja, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, to the left.

responses.english: On the ground floor, to the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: En la planta baja, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where combined tickets are sold
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde venden las entradas combinadas?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs DÓN-deh BEHN-dehn LAHS ehnt-RAH-dahs kohm-bee-NAH-dahs

likely_response.local: En taquilla planta baja, junto a la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN tah-k-EEL-lah PLAHN-tah BAH-hah HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ground floor ticket office, by the entrance.

responses.english: At the ground floor ticket office, by the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN tah-k-EEL-lah PLAHN-tah BAH-hah HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.local: En taquilla planta baja, junto a la entrada.
